creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text:
I'm running head/r320900 on amd64 using GENERIC-NODEBUG kernel configuration.
All three i386-wine-* ports crash on startup.

Core was generated by `/usr/local/bin/../bin32/wine winecfg.exe'.
Program terminated with signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
#0  0x00000000 in ?? ()
(gdb) bt
#0  0x00000000 in ?? ()
#1  0x8039767f in _elf_aux_info (aux=<optimized out>, 
    buf=0x803aba00 <__stack_chk_guard>, buflen=32)
    at /usr/src/lib/libc/gen/auxv.c:126
#2  0x80322297 in __guard_setup ()
    at /usr/src/lib/libc/secure/stack_protector.c:62
#3  0x80399562 in ?? () from /usr/lib32/libc.so.7
#4  0x8039957d in _init () from /usr/lib32/libc.so.7
#5  0x00000000 in ?? ()
(gdb) quit
